taxonomy: Euploca polyphylla is classified within the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the borage family. Euploca polyphylla is an annual or biennial herb, characterized by its multiple stems and small, white or purple flowers. It is often found in association with other desert vegetation, such as creosote bush and palo verde trees.
